theme_and_archetype.description: High-energy, command-center focus. Tactical minimalism with deep black backgrounds, high-contrast pure white text, and aggressive electric red highlights (F1 Red). Focuses on speed, precision, and elite athleticism.

headings.description: Massive, condensed sans-serif for extreme impact and a high-speed athletic aesthetic.

body.description: Clean, highly readable geometric sans-serif for technical data, rules, and telemetry stats.

scale.small_label: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-red-500

surface_strategies.cards: bg-zinc-950 border border-white/5 hover:border-red-500/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(225,6,0,0.15)]
surface_strategies.technical_lines: relative after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:h-[1px] after:w-full after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-red-500 after:to-transparent

hover_states.buttons: hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white transform hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all

motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Use framer-motion for staggered entrance of grid items (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0).
motion_and_interactions.timeline: Horizontal scroll or vertical line that fills with red as user scrolls down.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Ensure all motion respects prefers-reduced-motion media query.

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

hero.layout: Full viewport height. Massive typography overlay.
hero.background: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) over high-speed racing image.
hero.typography: H1 should break the grid, extending aggressively across the screen. Optional: Red laser line tracing across.

sections.title: F1 Basics
sections.layout: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical cards defining concepts like 'DRS', 'Downforce', 'Halo'.

sections.title: Race Weekend Flow
sections.layout: Timeline / Horizontal Flow. Use Shadcn Tabs or custom Framer Motion vertical timeline connecting Practice -> Qualifying -> Race.

sections.title: Rules & Flags
sections.layout: Grid layout. Cards representing each flag. On hover, the card background shifts heavily to the flag's color (e.g., bright yellow, solid red) and text turns black for contrast if needed.

sections.title: Tyre Strategy
sections.layout: Infographic style. Use Shadcn HoverCards or Accordions to explain Soft (Red), Medium (Yellow), Hard (White), Wet (Blue), Inter (Green) tyres.

sections.title: 2025/2026 Grid
sections.layout: Dense Data grid. 20 drivers. High-contrast B&W photos that colorize on hover. Prominent typography for car numbers.

shadcn_customization.tabs: Override default rounded borders. Use square edges, red active states, transparent inactive states with white text.
shadcn_customization.cards: Remove default white background. Use bg-zinc-950, square corners, 1px white/10 border.
shadcn_customization.buttons: Square corners, pure red (#E10600) bg, pure white text, uppercase bold font.
shadcn_customization.accordion: Border-b only, no side borders, white text, red chevron.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA minimum. Use text-shadow if placing text over images.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'driver-card-44', 'flag-yellow-info'.

hero_background.description: F1 race car speeding around a track. Use with a black/60 gradient overlay.

texture_carbon.description: Dark carbon fiber geometric pattern. Use as a subtle background texture for the Basics or Strategy section.

tyre_strategy.description: Close up of a racing tyre in smoke/rain. Use in the Tyre Strategy section alongside infographics.

neon_speed_abstract.description: Dynamic abstract red neon lights. Use for transition blocks, footers, or hover states for high-speed effect.

driver_helmet.description: Racing helmet. Use in the Quick Guide or Auth section.
